name: cerby
description: cerby — the gate guardian for agentic coding. A loadable rule-corpus plus opt-in guardrail hooks that govern how an AI agent does coding work: clarity over cleverness, safety over speed, never leave the repo broken, and nothing unproven passes the gate. Load it into a session, reload after compaction, install per-project hooks, prepare an existing repo, or audit a repo's conformance to the rules.

interface.shortDescription: The gate guardian for agentic coding — loadable rules + opt-in guardrail hooks.
